title: Grammitis subfasciata
taxonomy: Grammitis subfasciata is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This family is a part of the larger group known as Polypodiales. Polypodiales is a suborder of ferns that includes various species commonly referred to as "ferns". At the kingdom level, Grammitis subfasciata belongs to Plantae, which includes all plant species. Grammitis subfasciata is also commonly referred to as a species of the genus Grammitis.

intro: Grammitis subfasciata, also known as Polypodium subfasciatum, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and promote wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Grammitis subfasciata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
